channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Market Prices Art with Fair Hopping and Style
item.description: Pollock and Rothko soar, alongside ghostly spaces, sublime seas, and the power of yarn.

item.title: San Francisco immigration court closes after judge removals, disrupting asylum cases
item.description: No immigrants await rulings at San Francisco's main immigration court, and no lawyers are presenting arguments.

item.title: Taiwan: The Small Superpower
item.description: If the island's chip production halted, the global economy would grind to a halt. That is real leverage.

item.title: Lionel Jospin and the Dismantling of French Education
item.description: How the French left dismantled a public good.
